personalInfo.title: Solution Architect | React Architect | Frontend Lead | Next.js | React Native | 15+ Yrs
personalInfo.location: Open to UK Relocation | Previous Onsite UK Experience (National Grid)
personalInfo.summary: **Solution Architect & React Architect** with **15+ years** building **high-scale SaaS platforms** and **cloud native applications** for **Fortune 500 enterprises**. Expert in **Frontend Architecture (React, Next.js, Micro Frontends)**, **React Native mobile development**, and **AI integrations (RAG-based systems)**. Proven hands on engineering leader driving **end-to-end product development** and **cross-functional and distributed team delivery** across **web, iOS, and Android**. Track record of **optimizing system performance by 40%**, **reducing infrastructure costs by 25%**, and delivering **production-grade AI solutions**. **1+ year onsite UK experience with National Grid**. Open to UK relocation with employer-sponsored visa support.

workAuthorization: Right to Work: Visa Sponsorship Required | 1+ Year Onsite UK Experience (National Grid)
